TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Heping a sakuwan ku Taichung. kumud nu kalesakan, 1,006.12 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 900.79 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 62.11 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 6,503 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,544 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,838 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 59%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Heping mala 8 a cuwen atu 13 ku niyazu'. kina 13 a niyazu'sa, Sqoyaw ,Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . Hepin Hepin Say-kaw-li-ke Atayal , Pasing, Taywan Ngayngay a kamu tu ta-pu a ngiha foňá pinňá ki+ han, sepat a kuwan foňá pinňá kiňä, Taywan a kamu u H√ī-p√ģng-khu han, nu Cung-hua-min-kou Tay-cung a kenis u cacayay a sakuwan a kenis, tini i Tay-cung a kenis nusawalian, u tademaw pakala tu 1.08 a mang, u saahebalal a hekal, cayay kakatuud ku tademaw, u tademaw saadidiay a kakitizaan, nu Tay-cung a kinis labu nu sakuwan u sacacayay a sakuwan yincumin a kakitizaan, u hekal u satabakiay a hamin nu kanatal satu u cacayay malabas tu cacay malebut ping-bang-kung-li sakuwan akakitizaan, i hamin nu kanatal kenis, niyazu' akuwan nu kenis, i sakuwan tu kenis u hekal sakasepat nu talakaway nu hamin nu kanatal. Hepin a kenis tungusay u sakuwan tu kakitizaan nu yincumin, sihulicay a enengan tu kakitizaan u pulung nu teked a sikuwan, situngus tu nu kenisay kakitizaan a sakuwan, Tay-cung a kenis nuzumaay a sakuwan a kenis caay kalecat ku kawaw, Hepin a yakuba nu Hepin teket a sakuwan, caay kunu Tay-cung a zebu tu nu taylinay a kabut, tayhiw nu Hepin u Hepin tu ku mikuwanay tu ni pahulicanay tu. laylay pikuwanan nu Lipun, nu Tay-cung-cuw Dung-se-cun a kenis banacadan a lala', uynian a kawaw izaw tu ku itawyaay a Taylin milisimet. Atayal Suan-ciy a niyazu' sikawaw tu a sakalahitay hawsa, hamin han ku kakitizaan palatusa tu ilikutay tu kakitizaan nu Atayal, May-bu-ping, Ciw-liang-si atu Ciya-yang, atu sabaw siwa a palaylinan cacay bataan ku niyazu', pacici'han misanad ku yincumin palimat mueneng, kya a kapah mikuwan. 2010 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 25 a demiad, zayhan Ťáļšł≠a kenis, Taycuw tuse a sakuwan papulung han misumad tu sakuwan, pasumad han ku Taycung a Hepin , maales tu nuyaanay tu akenis situngus tu nu teked a sakuwan atu teked masapungungay. hekal a lala' ,śĚĪŚčĘŚćÄ. Hepin itini Taycuw unusawalian, nuwamisan makay satipan katukuh i nuwalian kakilac han tu Taywan-sen Miaw-li a kuwan Zuo-lan-cen a niyazu', Tay-an a kenis, Sin-cu a kuwan tu Can-se a kenis, Yi-lan a kuwan malabelaw ku Ta-tung a kenis, sawalian atu nutimulan atu kakilac tu Tay-wan-sen a Nabakuwan Siw-lin a kenis atu Nan-tuw a kuwan Ren-ay a kenis malabelaw tu Guo-sing a kenis satipan a belaw u Sin-se a kenis , Dung-se a kenis. . Hepin a kakitizaan tini i Sue-san abutu'an tu nusatimulan, izaw ku Ta-cia a sauwac mibesul , satipan a demiad u tatungusay a akuti'ay nuwaliay, nuwalian akiti cuete tatungusay ku akuti' tahkal kunu satipan satipan akuti' nuwalian cuede, unipalumaan izaw ku mami' nitulesan a nasi, alupal, Hepin tu nuwalian yadah kunipalumaan tu lingu, nasi, lupas,uyya nu buyu', lami' nu buyu',waneng nu wadu atuudan, u sienaw a lami' u angangan sapawapen a lala',u zuma Wu-lin a palimaan Ci-cia-wan a sauwac u kalikid nu Tay-wan yin-hua-cou-wen-kuy a buting a niyazu'. ťęėŚĪĪ: . buyu', ilabu nu Sue-san a buyu' atu kalaliwasak nu Cung-yang-san-may, 2,000-3,000 a depahan mazeked u buyu', tapingan a buyu' izaw ku yadah ku 3,000 malebut a debah ku buyu' katalakaw. ś≤≥śĶĀ: . sauwac, i labu yadah ku adidi'ay tabakiay a sauwac a masa cipa' u masaupuay masatukalay a sauwac papusutay a helung u cascas a mahiniay aazihan, uynian a katitizaan i tini i pabaw nu Ta-cya a sauwac satipan nuwamisan tu Ze-you-li atu Da-kuan-li i tini i Da-an a sauwacan, i pabaw u sauwac a diheb San-ku-ti. . ungsin, Ta-yia a sauwac Ku-kuan a ungain i labu izaw ku cu'detay Ma-ling a ungsin. . Se-yung likecuay a buyu', tini i Taywan yi-lan a kuwan labu nu Da-tung a kenis, nika capiay a Hepin a lilis, nu Lan-yang a sauwac atu Da-yia a sauwac a kasananum. ngangan nu niyazu' Hepin a kakitizaan i tini i buyu' a kakitizaan, palalecad tu niyazu' izaw ku "Huan-san, Se-yuan, Wu-lin", Li-san ni niyazu' izaw ku "Cin-san, Cia-yang, Li-san, Sung-maw", Bu-ay ni niyazu' izaw ku "Li-leng, Sung-he, Ha-lun-tay, Ku-kuan, Ma-lin", Tyan-lun niyazu' izaw ku "Bay-leng", ,ŚćóŚčĘťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku ,ni niyazu' izaw kušł≠ŚĚĎťáĆ ,Ťá™ÁĒĪťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku ,ťĀĒŤßÄťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku walu a kasiniyazu' duduc tu saculil tulu ku kakitizaan a zazan.
S.PHON: ńß…ôpiŇč a sakuwan ku tai ¶ńßuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, *,***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(tajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan ńß…ôpiŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, s*ojaw ,tabuk , sr~…ĺamaw , r~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč , m Ē~ °ińßu , tgbin , r~…ĺ Ē~ °or~…ĺu , kr~…ĺiŇč , pasiŇč , sr~…ĺamaw , tbur~…ĺan , s Ē~ °ju* , ńßruŇč . ńß…ôpin ńß…ôpin saj-kaw-r~…ĺi-k…ô atajar~…ĺ , pasiŇč, tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a kamu tu ta-pu a Ňčińßa fo* pin* ki+ ńßan, s…ôpat a kuwan fo* pin* ki*, tajwan a kamu u ńß*-p*Ňč-kńßu ńßan, nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kou taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis u ¶a ¶ajaj a sakuwan a k…ônis, tini i taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis nusawar~…ĺian, u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *.** a maŇč, u saańß…ôbar~…ĺar~…ĺ a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶ajaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw, u tad…ômaw saadidiaj a kakitizaan, nu taj- ¶uŇč a kinis r~…ĺabu nu sakuwan u sa ¶a ¶ajaj a sakuwan jin ¶umin a kakitizaan, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u satabakiaj a ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ satu u ¶a ¶ajaj mar~…ĺabas tu ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi sakuwan akakitizaan, i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ k…ônis, nijazu Ē~ ° akuwan nu k…ônis, i sakuwan tu k…ônis u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sakas…ôpat nu tar~…ĺakawaj nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ. ńß…ôpin a k…ônis tuŇčusaj u sakuwan tu kakitizaan nu jin ¶umin, sińßur~…ĺi ¶aj a …ôn…ôŇčan tu kakitizaan u pur~…ĺuŇč nu t…ôk…ôd a sikuwan, situŇčus tu nu k…ônisaj kakitizaan a sakuwan, taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis nuzumaaj a sakuwan a k…ônis ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶at ku kawaw, ńß…ôpin a jakuba nu ńß…ôpin t…ôk…ôt a sakuwan, ¶aaj kunu taj- ¶uŇč a z…ôbu tu nu tajr~…ĺinaj a kabut, tajńßiw nu ńß…ôpin u ńß…ôpin tu ku mikuwanaj tu ni pańßur~…ĺi ¶anaj tu. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun, nu taj- ¶uŇč- ¶uw duŇč-s…ô- ¶un a k…ônis bana ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ujnian a kawaw izaw tu ku itawjaaj a tajr~…ĺin mir~…ĺisim…ôt. atajar~…ĺ suan- ¶ij a nijazu Ē~ ° sikawaw tu a sakar~…ĺańßitaj ńßawsa, ńßamin ńßan ku kakitizaan par~…ĺatusa tu ir~…ĺikutaj tu kakitizaan nu atajar~…ĺ, maj-bu-piŇč, ¶iw-r~…ĺiaŇč-si atu ¶ija-jaŇč, atu sabaw siwa a par~…ĺajr~…ĺinan ¶a ¶aj bataan ku nijazu Ē~ °, pa ¶i ¶i Ē~ °ńßan misanad ku jin ¶umin par~…ĺimat mu…ôn…ôŇč, kja a kapańß mikuwan. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, zajńßan **a k…ônis, taj ¶uw tus…ô a sakuwan papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan misumad tu sakuwan, pasumad ńßan ku taj ¶uŇč a ńß…ôpin , maar~…ĺ…ôs tu nujaanaj tu ak…ônis situŇčus tu nu t…ôk…ôd a sakuwan atu t…ôk…ôd masapuŇčuŇčaj. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ,***. ńß…ôpin itini taj ¶uw unusawar~…ĺian, nuwamisan makaj satipan katukuńß i nuwar~…ĺian kakir~…ĺa ¶ ńßan tu tajwan-s…ôn miaw-r~…ĺi a kuwan zuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ôn a nijazu Ē~ °, taj-an a k…ônis, sin- ¶u a kuwan tu ¶an-s…ô a k…ônis, ji-r~…ĺan a kuwan mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw ku ta-tuŇč a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian atu nutimur~…ĺan atu kakir~…ĺa ¶ tu taj-wan-s…ôn a nabakuwan siw-r~…ĺin a k…ônis atu nan-tuw a kuwan *…ôn-aj a k…ônis mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw tu guo-siŇč a k…ônis satipan a b…ôr~…ĺaw u sin-s…ô a k…ônis , duŇč-s…ô a k…ônis. . ńß…ôpin a kakitizaan tini i su…ô-san abutu Ē~ °an tu nusatimur~…ĺan, izaw ku ta- ¶ia a sauwa ¶ mib…ôsur~…ĺ , satipan a d…ômiad u tatuŇčusaj a akuti Ē~ °aj nuwar~…ĺiaj, nuwar~…ĺian akiti ¶u…ôt…ô tatuŇčusaj ku akuti Ē~ ° tańßkar~…ĺ kunu satipan satipan akuti Ē~ ° nuwar~…ĺian ¶u…ôd…ô, unipar~…ĺumaan izaw ku mami Ē~ ° nitur~…ĺ…ôsan a nasi, ar~…ĺupar~…ĺ, ńß…ôpin tu nuwar~…ĺian jadańß kunipar~…ĺumaan tu r~…ĺiŇču, nasi, r~…ĺupas,ujja nu buju Ē~ °, r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu buju Ē~ °,wan…ôŇč nu wadu atuudan, u si…ônaw a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° u aŇčaŇčan sapawap…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °,u zuma wu-r~…ĺin a par~…ĺimaan ¶i- ¶ia-wan a sauwa ¶ u kar~…ĺikid nu taj-wan jin-ńßua- ¶ou-w…ôn-kuj a butiŇč a nijazu Ē~ °. **: . buju Ē~ °, ir~…ĺabu nu su…ô-san a buju Ē~ ° atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, *,***-*,*** a d…ôpańßan maz…ôk…ôd u buju Ē~ °, tapiŇčan a buju Ē~ ° izaw ku jadańß ku *,*** mar~…ĺ…ôbut a d…ôbańß ku buju Ē~ ° katar~…ĺakaw. **: . sauwa ¶, i r~…ĺabu jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj tabakiaj a sauwa ¶ a masa ¶ipa Ē~ ° u masaupuaj masatukar~…ĺaj a sauwa ¶ papusutaj a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč u ¶as ¶as a mańßiniaj aazińßan, ujnian a katitizaan i tini i pabaw nu ta- ¶ja a sauwa ¶ satipan nuwamisan tu z…ô-jou-r~…ĺi atu da-kuan-r~…ĺi i tini i da-an a sauwa ¶an, i pabaw u sauwa ¶ a dińß…ôb san-ku-ti. . uŇčsin, ta-jia a sauwa ¶ ku-kuan a uŇčain i r~…ĺabu izaw ku ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj ma-r~…ĺiŇč a uŇčsin. . s…ô-juŇč r~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj a buju Ē~ °, tini i tajwan ji-r~…ĺan a kuwan r~…ĺabu nu da-tuŇč a k…ônis, nika ¶apiaj a ńß…ôpin a r~…ĺir~…ĺis, nu r~…ĺan-jaŇč a sauwa ¶ atu da-jia a sauwa ¶ a kasananum. ŇčaŇčan nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńß…ôpin a kakitizaan i tini i buju Ē~ ° a kakitizaan, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "ńßuan-san, s…ô-juan, wu-r~…ĺin", r~…ĺi-san ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku " ¶in-san, ¶ia-jaŇč, r~…ĺi-san, suŇč-maw", bu-aj ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "r~…ĺi-r~…ĺ…ôŇč, suŇč-ńß…ô, ńßa-r~…ĺun-taj, ku-kuan, ma-r~…ĺin", tjan-r~…ĺun nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "baj-r~…ĺ…ôŇč", ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku ,ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku*** ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku war~…ĺu a kasinijazu Ē~ ° dudu ¶ tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tur~…ĺu ku kakitizaan a zazan.
S.FORM: Heping a sakuwan ku Taichung. kumud nu kalesakan, 1,006.12 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 900.79 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 62.11 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 6,503 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,544 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,838 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 59%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Heping mala 8 a cuwen atu 13 ku niyazu'. kina 13 a niyazu'sa, Sqoyaw ,Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . Hepin Hepin Say-kaw-li-ke Atayal , Pasing, Taywan Ngayngay a kamu tu ta-pu a ngiha foňá pinňá ki+ han, sepat a kuwan foňá pinňá kiňä, Taywan a kamu u H√ī-p√ģng-khu han, nu Cung-hua-min-kou Tay-cung a kenis u cacayay a sakuwan a kenis, tini i Tay-cung a kenis nusawalian, u tademaw pakala tu 1.08 a mang, u saahebalal a hekal, cayay kakatuud ku tademaw, u tademaw saadidiay a kakitizaan, nu Tay-cung a kinis labu nu sakuwan u sacacayay a sakuwan yincumin a kakitizaan, u hekal u satabakiay a hamin nu kanatal satu u cacayay malabas tu cacay malebut ping-bang-kung-li sakuwan akakitizaan, i hamin nu kanatal kenis, niyazu' akuwan nu kenis, i sakuwan tu kenis u hekal sakasepat nu talakaway nu hamin nu kanatal. Hepin a kenis tungusay u sakuwan tu kakitizaan nu yincumin, sihulicay a enengan tu kakitizaan u pulung nu teked a sikuwan, situngus tu nu kenisay kakitizaan a sakuwan, Tay-cung a kenis nuzumaay a sakuwan a kenis caay kalecat ku kawaw, Hepin a yakuba nu Hepin teket a sakuwan, caay kunu Tay-cung a zebu tu nu taylinay a kabut, tayhiw nu Hepin u Hepin tu ku mikuwanay tu ni pahulicanay tu. laylay pikuwanan nu Lipun, nu Tay-cung-cuw Dung-se-cun a kenis banacadan a lala', uynian a kawaw izaw tu ku itawyaay a Taylin milisimet. Atayal Suan-ciy a niyazu' sikawaw tu a sakalahitay hawsa, hamin han ku kakitizaan palatusa tu ilikutay tu kakitizaan nu Atayal, May-bu-ping, Ciw-liang-si atu Ciya-yang, atu sabaw siwa a palaylinan cacay bataan ku niyazu', pacici'han misanad ku yincumin palimat mueneng, kya a kapah mikuwan. 2010 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 25 a demiad, zayhan Ťáļšł≠a kenis, Taycuw tuse a sakuwan papulung han misumad tu sakuwan, pasumad han ku Taycung a Hepin , maales tu nuyaanay tu akenis situngus tu nu teked a sakuwan atu teked masapungungay. hekal a lala' ,śĚĪŚčĘŚćÄ. Hepin itini Taycuw unusawalian, nuwamisan makay satipan katukuh i nuwalian kakilac han tu Taywan-sen Miaw-li a kuwan Zuo-lan-cen a niyazu', Tay-an a kenis, Sin-cu a kuwan tu Can-se a kenis, Yi-lan a kuwan malabelaw ku Ta-tung a kenis, sawalian atu nutimulan atu kakilac tu Tay-wan-sen a Nabakuwan Siw-lin a kenis atu Nan-tuw a kuwan Ren-ay a kenis malabelaw tu Guo-sing a kenis satipan a belaw u Sin-se a kenis , Dung-se a kenis. . Hepin a kakitizaan tini i Sue-san abutu'an tu nusatimulan, izaw ku Ta-cia a sauwac mibesul , satipan a demiad u tatungusay a akuti'ay nuwaliay, nuwalian akiti cuete tatungusay ku akuti' tahkal kunu satipan satipan akuti' nuwalian cuede, unipalumaan izaw ku mami' nitulesan a nasi, alupal, Hepin tu nuwalian yadah kunipalumaan tu lingu, nasi, lupas,uyya nu buyu', lami' nu buyu',waneng nu wadu atuudan, u sienaw a lami' u angangan sapawapen a lala',u zuma Wu-lin a palimaan Ci-cia-wan a sauwac u kalikid nu Tay-wan yin-hua-cou-wen-kuy a buting a niyazu'. ťęėŚĪĪ: . buyu', ilabu nu Sue-san a buyu' atu kalaliwasak nu Cung-yang-san-may, 2,000-3,000 a depahan mazeked u buyu', tapingan a buyu' izaw ku yadah ku 3,000 malebut a debah ku buyu' katalakaw. ś≤≥śĶĀ: . sauwac, i labu yadah ku adidi'ay tabakiay a sauwac a masa cipa' u masaupuay masatukalay a sauwac papusutay a helung u cascas a mahiniay aazihan, uynian a katitizaan i tini i pabaw nu Ta-cya a sauwac satipan nuwamisan tu Ze-you-li atu Da-kuan-li i tini i Da-an a sauwacan, i pabaw u sauwac a diheb San-ku-ti. . ungsin, Ta-yia a sauwac Ku-kuan a ungain i labu izaw ku cu'detay Ma-ling a ungsin. . Se-yung likecuay a buyu', tini i Taywan yi-lan a kuwan labu nu Da-tung a kenis, nika capiay a Hepin a lilis, nu Lan-yang a sauwac atu Da-yia a sauwac a kasananum. ngangan nu niyazu' Hepin a kakitizaan i tini i buyu' a kakitizaan, palalecad tu niyazu' izaw ku "Huan-san, Se-yuan, Wu-lin", Li-san ni niyazu' izaw ku "Cin-san, Cia-yang, Li-san, Sung-maw", Bu-ay ni niyazu' izaw ku "Li-leng, Sung-he, Ha-lun-tay, Ku-kuan, Ma-lin", Tyan-lun niyazu' izaw ku "Bay-leng", ,ŚćóŚčĘťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku ,ni niyazu' izaw kušł≠ŚĚĎťáĆ ,Ťá™ÁĒĪťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku ,ťĀĒŤßÄťáĆni niyazu' izaw ku walu a kasiniyazu' duduc tu saculil tulu ku kakitizaan a zazan.

(kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(tajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan ńß…ôpiŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, s*ojaw ,tabuk , sr~…ĺamaw , r~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč , m Ē~ °ińßu , tgbin , r~…ĺ Ē~ °or~…ĺu , kr~…ĺiŇč , pasiŇč , sr~…ĺamaw , tbur~…ĺan , s Ē~ °ju* , ńßruŇč . ńß…ôpin ńß…ôpin saj-kaw-r~…ĺi-k…ô atajar~…ĺ , pasiŇč, tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a kamu tu ta-pu a Ňčińßa fo* pin* ki+ ńßan, s…ôpat a kuwan fo* pin* ki*, tajwan a kamu u ńß*-p*Ňč-kńßu ńßan, nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kou taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis u ¶a ¶ajaj a sakuwan a k…ônis, tini i taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis nusawar~…ĺian, u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *.** a maŇč, u saańß…ôbar~…ĺar~…ĺ a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶ajaj kakatuud ku tad…ômaw, u tad…ômaw saadidiaj a kakitizaan, nu taj- ¶uŇč a kinis r~…ĺabu nu sakuwan u sa ¶a ¶ajaj a sakuwan jin ¶umin a kakitizaan, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u satabakiaj a ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ satu u ¶a ¶ajaj mar~…ĺabas tu ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺ…ôbut piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi sakuwan akakitizaan, i ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ k…ônis, nijazu Ē~ ° akuwan nu k…ônis, i sakuwan tu k…ônis u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sakas…ôpat nu tar~…ĺakawaj nu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ. ńß…ôpin a k…ônis tuŇčusaj u sakuwan tu kakitizaan nu jin ¶umin, sińßur~…ĺi ¶aj a …ôn…ôŇčan tu kakitizaan u pur~…ĺuŇč nu t…ôk…ôd a sikuwan, situŇčus tu nu k…ônisaj kakitizaan a sakuwan, taj- ¶uŇč a k…ônis nuzumaaj a sakuwan a k…ônis ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶at ku kawaw, ńß…ôpin a jakuba nu ńß…ôpin t…ôk…ôt a sakuwan, ¶aaj kunu taj- ¶uŇč a z…ôbu tu nu tajr~…ĺinaj a kabut, tajńßiw nu ńß…ôpin u ńß…ôpin tu ku mikuwanaj tu ni pańßur~…ĺi ¶anaj tu. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun, nu taj- ¶uŇč- ¶uw duŇč-s…ô- ¶un a k…ônis bana ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ujnian a kawaw izaw tu ku itawjaaj a tajr~…ĺin mir~…ĺisim…ôt. atajar~…ĺ suan- ¶ij a nijazu Ē~ ° sikawaw tu a sakar~…ĺańßitaj ńßawsa, ńßamin ńßan ku kakitizaan par~…ĺatusa tu ir~…ĺikutaj tu kakitizaan nu atajar~…ĺ, maj-bu-piŇč, ¶iw-r~…ĺiaŇč-si atu ¶ija-jaŇč, atu sabaw siwa a par~…ĺajr~…ĺinan ¶a ¶aj bataan ku nijazu Ē~ °, pa ¶i ¶i Ē~ °ńßan misanad ku jin ¶umin par~…ĺimat mu…ôn…ôŇč, kja a kapańß mikuwan. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, zajńßan **a k…ônis, taj ¶uw tus…ô a sakuwan papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan misumad tu sakuwan, pasumad ńßan ku taj ¶uŇč a ńß…ôpin , maar~…ĺ…ôs tu nujaanaj tu ak…ônis situŇčus tu nu t…ôk…ôd a sakuwan atu t…ôk…ôd masapuŇčuŇčaj. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ,***. ńß…ôpin itini taj ¶uw unusawar~…ĺian, nuwamisan makaj satipan katukuńß i nuwar~…ĺian kakir~…ĺa ¶ ńßan tu tajwan-s…ôn miaw-r~…ĺi a kuwan zuo-r~…ĺan- ¶…ôn a nijazu Ē~ °, taj-an a k…ônis, sin- ¶u a kuwan tu ¶an-s…ô a k…ônis, ji-r~…ĺan a kuwan mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw ku ta-tuŇč a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian atu nutimur~…ĺan atu kakir~…ĺa ¶ tu taj-wan-s…ôn a nabakuwan siw-r~…ĺin a k…ônis atu nan-tuw a kuwan *…ôn-aj a k…ônis mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw tu guo-siŇč a k…ônis satipan a b…ôr~…ĺaw u sin-s…ô a k…ônis , duŇč-s…ô a k…ônis. . ńß…ôpin a kakitizaan tini i su…ô-san abutu Ē~ °an tu nusatimur~…ĺan, izaw ku ta- ¶ia a sauwa ¶ mib…ôsur~…ĺ , satipan a d…ômiad u tatuŇčusaj a akuti Ē~ °aj nuwar~…ĺiaj, nuwar~…ĺian akiti ¶u…ôt…ô tatuŇčusaj ku akuti Ē~ ° tańßkar~…ĺ kunu satipan satipan akuti Ē~ ° nuwar~…ĺian ¶u…ôd…ô, unipar~…ĺumaan izaw ku mami Ē~ ° nitur~…ĺ…ôsan a nasi, ar~…ĺupar~…ĺ, ńß…ôpin tu nuwar~…ĺian jadańß kunipar~…ĺumaan tu r~…ĺiŇču, nasi, r~…ĺupas,ujja nu buju Ē~ °, r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu buju Ē~ °,wan…ôŇč nu wadu atuudan, u si…ônaw a r~…ĺami Ē~ ° u aŇčaŇčan sapawap…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °,u zuma wu-r~…ĺin a par~…ĺimaan ¶i- ¶ia-wan a sauwa ¶ u kar~…ĺikid nu taj-wan jin-ńßua- ¶ou-w…ôn-kuj a butiŇč a nijazu Ē~ °. **: . buju Ē~ °, ir~…ĺabu nu su…ô-san a buju Ē~ ° atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak nu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, *,***-*,*** a d…ôpańßan maz…ôk…ôd u buju Ē~ °, tapiŇčan a buju Ē~ ° izaw ku jadańß ku *,*** mar~…ĺ…ôbut a d…ôbańß ku buju Ē~ ° katar~…ĺakaw. **: . sauwa ¶, i r~…ĺabu jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj tabakiaj a sauwa ¶ a masa ¶ipa Ē~ ° u masaupuaj masatukar~…ĺaj a sauwa ¶ papusutaj a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč u ¶as ¶as a mańßiniaj aazińßan, ujnian a katitizaan i tini i pabaw nu ta- ¶ja a sauwa ¶ satipan nuwamisan tu z…ô-jou-r~…ĺi atu da-kuan-r~…ĺi i tini i da-an a sauwa ¶an, i pabaw u sauwa ¶ a dińß…ôb san-ku-ti. . uŇčsin, ta-jia a sauwa ¶ ku-kuan a uŇčain i r~…ĺabu izaw ku ¶u Ē~ °d…ôtaj ma-r~…ĺiŇč a uŇčsin. . s…ô-juŇč r~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj a buju Ē~ °, tini i tajwan ji-r~…ĺan a kuwan r~…ĺabu nu da-tuŇč a k…ônis, nika ¶apiaj a ńß…ôpin a r~…ĺir~…ĺis, nu r~…ĺan-jaŇč a sauwa ¶ atu da-jia a sauwa ¶ a kasananum. ŇčaŇčan nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńß…ôpin a kakitizaan i tini i buju Ē~ ° a kakitizaan, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "ńßuan-san, s…ô-juan, wu-r~…ĺin", r~…ĺi-san ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku " ¶in-san, ¶ia-jaŇč, r~…ĺi-san, suŇč-maw", bu-aj ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "r~…ĺi-r~…ĺ…ôŇč, suŇč-ńß…ô, ńßa-r~…ĺun-taj, ku-kuan, ma-r~…ĺin", tjan-r~…ĺun nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku "baj-r~…ĺ…ôŇč", ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku ,ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku*** ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku ,***ni nijazu Ē~ ° izaw ku war~…ĺu a kasinijazu Ē~ ° dudu ¶ tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tur~…ĺu ku kakitizaan a zazan.
